identity.vibe: Tactical Minimalism, Professional Audio Control Room
identity.justification: Audio engineering dashboards require high density, low eye strain (dark mode), and absolute precision. The Performance Pro archetype provides the sharp, high-contrast visual cues needed for active channels, clipping, and routing without decorative distraction.

rules: NEVER use Inter, Roboto, Open Sans, Lato, or Syne.
Use JetBrains Mono for ALL numeric readouts (dB, ms, Hz, Ratio) to ensure tabular lining.
Labels must be uppercase, tracking-[0.2em], text-xs.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Dense. Use p-2, p-4, gap-1, gap-2.
layout_and_spacing.borders_and_radius: Sharp edges. Use rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px). 1px solid strokes for all containers.
structure: Header: Slim, sticky top, contains version selector (16x16 / 8x8), Preset Management and I/O global status.
Main Canvas: Horizontal scrolling for Channel Strips layout, or dense Matrix Grid layout.
Channel Strip: Fixed width (e.g., w-28 or w-32), vertical flow (Input Name -> Crossover -> EQ -> Comp/Limiter -> Delay -> Pan -> Fader/Meter).

channel_strip.rules: Flex col, border-r border-border, h-full, dense internal spacing (p-2). Do NOT use Shadcn Card here to avoid padding bloat.

fader.rules: Vertical orientation constraint. Track is dark gray, thumb is bright primary or white. Must update value instantaneously via Web Audio API or fast state.

knobs_and_dials.rules: If true rotary knobs are too complex, use compact horizontal Shadcn sliders mapped accurately with mono-value readouts directly above them.

meters.rules: Vertical segmented bar or linear gradient (Green -> Yellow -> Red). MUST include a distinct red 'CLIP' LED block at the very top.

matrix_router.rules: Dense CSS Grid or Flex Matrix. 1rem to 1.5rem cell size. Interactive nodes toggle routing state. Empty = unrouted, Filled/Icon = routed. Style like Dante Controller.

eq_graph.rules: Use Recharts (AreaChart or LineChart). Logarithmic X-axis representation for 20Hz to 20kHz. Clean line with minimal fill opacity.

tabs.rules: Square, dense, border-b only, active state has primary color bottom border of 2px. No pill shapes.

motion_and_interactions.philosophy: Instantaneous. Audio engineers rely on immediate feedback. No floaty animations.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Fast. 100ms ease-out for color changes. Faders and meters must be 0ms latency.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Text color inversion or bright border highlights.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure pure white text on deep obsidian background. APCA standards preferred.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='ch1-mute-btn', data-testid='eq-freq-slider').

media.notes: No images used. Pro audio software relies purely on technical UI elements and data visualization.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. ARCHITECTURE: The app is a dense, horizontal-scrolling 'Control Room' dashboard. Ensure the main workspace has overflow-x-auto for 16-channel layouts.
2. AUDIO ENGINE: Implement Web Audio API (or robust mock state) for BiquadFilter, DynamicsCompressor, DelayNode, and PannerNode. Handle audio file upload/playback routing through this chain.

3. DELAY BUG FIX: The core requested fix is the channel delay. Ensure the 'Delay' parameter operates reliably, saves to state instantly without latency, and converts correctly between ms, mm, and inches (ms = distance / 343).
4. PRESETS: Implement robust JSON serialization of the full matrix/channel state to localStorage.
5. ROUTING: The Matrix Router must map physical/virtual inputs to physical/virtual outputs in an N x N grid.
6. UI EXECUTION: Rely on native HTML/Tailwind for the heavy layouts (channel strips, matrix) to keep the DOM light. Use Shadcn ONLY for generic inputs, selects, or complex modals.
7. AESTHETICS: Stick rigidly to the Performance Pro tactical archetype. No soft shadows, no glassmorphism in the main work area (only for floating modals). 1px crisp borders.
8. VERSIONS: Build a toggle or landing choice for 16x16 vs 8x8 physical/virtual channel configurations.
9. TESTING: Embed data-testid on every single knob, slider, mute, solo, and routing button.
